goal: 扩展 idea discovery final 分桶和非开发者 source modules

summary.title: 扩展 idea discovery 为 3 桶 final 输出
summary.what: 把 idea-discovery-workflow 从全局最多 3 个 final idea 改为 dev_oss、vertical_b2b、consumer_prosumer 三个 final bucket，每桶最多 3 个；同步扩展 source modules、report format、role contracts、memory schema、automation prompt、scout kit 和 artifact checker。
summary.why: 现有日跑结果过度偏向开源小工具和 developer/agent infra。用户认可分桶方案，并要求先按三类各三个推进，同时扩展非开发者 source modules，并保留完整产品与 high-star OSS 的独立判断。
summary.user_goal: 扩展 idea discovery final 分桶和非开发者 source modules

decisions.rationale: 直接解决 dev/OSS idea 挤占全部 final slot 的路径依赖；允许 underfilled，不跨桶补位。
rejected: 继续使用全局最多 3 个 product/OSS ideas

decisions.chose: 按 bucket 定义 source coverage：dev/OSS 用 HN/GitHub/package ecosystem，vertical B2B 用 G2/Capterra/行业论坛/工作流材料，consumer/prosumer 用 app store/YouTube/TikTok/社区评论
decisions.rationale: source coverage 必须匹配目标用户群，否则 workflow 会自然回到开发者信息源。

decisions.chose: 增加 bucket fit gate，并把 complete-product path 与 high-star-OSS path 分开判断
decisions.rationale: vertical_b2b 和 consumer_prosumer 不能靠 repo/star asset 过关；dev_oss 才主要允许 high-star OSS 路径。

decisions.chose: 更新 idea-scout-kit 输出和 check-run-artifacts 校验 final_bucket、bucket_fit、bucket section 与每桶数量上限
decisions.rationale: 让新 contract 在实际 run artifacts 中可检查，而不是只存在于文档。

rejected.alternative: 只在 prompt 里要求多找 consumer/B2B ideas
rejected.reason: prompt-only 不能阻止 report/schema/checker 仍按旧的 3 idea/devtool 偏置运行。

rejected.alternative: 单独安装一个新 review-mining skill
rejected.reason: 本机现有最接近的是 ai-founder-playbook 的 market-scan；这次先把 bucketed source modules 内化到 idea-discovery-workflow 和 market-scan。

review_notes: 已运行 node --check idea-scout-kit.mjs 和 check-run-artifacts.mjs。
已运行 node skills/idea-discovery-workflow/scripts/idea-scout-kit.mjs，并确认输出包含 Final Bucket Targets、Bucket Fit Gate、vertical_b2b 和 consumer_prosumer source modules。
未 push；后续新 session 会基于当前分支运行一次新的 3x3 discovery。

architectural_claims: idea-discovery-workflow now treats developer/OSS, vertical B2B, and consumer/prosumer as first-class final buckets.
Evidence sweep is bucket-specific and should not substitute developer sources for vertical or consumer coverage.
Complete product and high-star OSS are separate promotion paths instead of one blended proof standard.
behavioral_changes: Default scheduled runs target up to 9 ideas, at most 3 per final bucket.
Scout kit emits bucket targets, bucketed thesis templates, bucketed source modules, bucket fit gate, and split promotion gate tables.
Artifact checker now requires final_bucket and bucket_fit in idea JSON, bucket sections in reports, and enforces at most 3 ideas per bucket.

data_model_changes.name: final_bucket
data_model_changes.location: ideas.jsonl, signals.jsonl, source-notes.jsonl, per-idea JSON dossiers
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing stored runs are not migrated; new run artifacts should include final_bucket.

data_model_changes.name: bucket_fit
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing stored runs are not migrated; new run artifacts should include bucket_fit.

migration_notes: Old run artifacts may fail the updated artifact checker because they lack final_bucket and bucket_fit; this change targets future runs, not retroactive migration.
